name: Franklin X-40 Outdoor Pickleballs
description: The Franklin X-40 is the official ball of USA Pickleball and the most widely used outdoor tournament ball. Precision-drilled 40-hole design ensures consistent flight and bounce in wind. Made from durable seamless construction that resists cracking in temperature extremes.
care_instructions: Store in a cool, dry place. Outdoor balls will eventually crack with heavy use — this is normal wear. Rotate balls during play to extend their life. Discard balls that show visible cracks or have lost their round shape.
